name: academy-lens
description: AcademyLens browser extension for translating OpenAI Academy course content with protected AI terminology.

scripts.lint: eslint src tests scripts playwright.config.js eslint.config.js
scripts.build:zip: rm -f dist/academy-lens.zip && mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/academy-lens.zip manifest.json assets src README.md PRIVACY_POLICY.md -x '*.DS_Store'
scripts.check:all: npm run node-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run check:manifest && npm run check:files
scripts.check:full: npm run check:all && npm run test:e2e && npm run build:zip
